docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY PARDINI, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RACHEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RACHEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARDINI, MIKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RACHEL PLFT WAS PRESENT FOR ROLL CALL BUT WAS NOT PRESENT WHEN CASE WAS CALLED. THE COURT WAITED FOR PLFT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO RACHEL RAMIREZ RETURNED--NO SUCH NUMBER
